title: Medical Assistant Bot — proactive diabetic check-ins by phone
description: An AI assistant that emails and calls diabetic patients daily, asks about blood sugar, blood pressure, and symptoms, and uses Groq (Llama 3.3) for real-time personalized guidance over a live call via Inkbox STT/TTS. Includes a Flask webhook and a WebSocket call server; ngrok exposes endpoints for Inkbox. Learnings: wiring voice agents to LLMs, safe escalation when readings are dangerous, and end-to-end local-to-phone testing.
